instructions: If locked=true, leave the translation as-is.
quality_notes: Shortened verified-only label for UI fit.
Tweaked a few Danish UI labels for naturalness/conciseness (Done, Location, Suggest provider).

entries.en: Swipe up or down to adjust rating
entries.da: Stryg op eller ned for at justere bedømmelsen

entries.en: Could not find coordinates for this address.
entries.da: Kunne ikke finde koordinater for denne adresse.

entries.en: Accepted: Medical license, registration certificate, or official ID
entries.da: Accepteret: Lægelig licens, registreringsattest eller officielt ID

entries.en: You are authorized to manage this profile
entries.da: Du er autoriseret til at administrere denne profil
Ved at indsende bekræfter du, at:

entries.en: Claim this profile to manage it
entries.da: Gør krav på denne profil for at administrere den

entries.en: What is your role at this practice?
entries.da: Hvad er din rolle i denne praksis?

entries.en: We'll review your claim within 1-3 business days. You'll be notified when it's approved.
entries.da: Vi gennemgår dit krav inden for 1-3 hverdage. Du får besked, når det er godkendt.

entries.en: There may be a connection issue. Please try again.
entries.da: Der kan være et forbindelsesproblem. Prøv venligst igen.

entries.en: Try searching another area or changing city.
entries.da: Prøv at søge i et andet område eller skift by.

entries.en: You can only submit one review per provider per date.
entries.da: Du kan kun indsende én anmeldelse pr. udbyder pr. dato.

entries.en: Your connection may be unstable right now. Try again to load the list.
entries.da: Din forbindelse kan være ustabil lige nu. Prøv igen for at indlæse listen.

entries.en: Couldn't load providers. Please try again.
entries.da: Kunne ikke indlæse udbydere. Prøv venligst igen.

entries.en: A network issue occurred. Please check your connection and try again.
entries.da: Der opstod et netværksproblem. Tjek din forbindelse og prøv igen.

entries.en: Please check your connection and try again.
entries.da: Tjek venligst din forbindelse og prøv igen.

entries.en: It looks like you're offline. Check your connection and try again.
entries.da: Det ser ud til, at du er offline. Tjek din forbindelse og prøv igen.

entries.en: Show only providers with verified reviews

entries.da: Søg i et andet område / Skift by

entries.en: Clear one or more filters, or move the map to expand results.
entries.da: Ryd en eller flere filtre, eller flyt kortet for at udvide resultaterne.

entries.en: Coverage is expanding in this area. Try a nearby city for now.
entries.da: Dækningen udvides i dette område. Prøv en nærliggende by for nu.

entries.en: No providers visible in this map area
entries.da: Ingen synlige udbydere i dette kortområde

entries.en: Try another area or pick a different city to continue.
entries.da: Prøv et andet område eller vælg en anden by for at fortsætte.

entries.en: Open Review, choose a provider, and complete the guided form.
entries.da: Åbn Bedøm, vælg en udbyder, og udfyld den guidede formular.

entries.en: Yes. Open My Reviews and tap Edit on your review.
entries.da: Ja. Åbn Mine anmeldelser og tryk på Rediger på din anmeldelse.

entries.en: Verified means the review passed our checks or includes supporting proof.
entries.da: Verificeret betyder, at anmeldelsen har bestået vores tjek eller inkluderer understøttende bevis.

entries.en: Open the review and tap Report. Our team will review it.
entries.da: Åbn anmeldelsen og tryk på Anmeld. Vores team vil gennemgå den.

entries.en: Go to Settings and request deletion. We will confirm when completed.
entries.da: Gå til Indstillinger og anmod om sletning. Vi bekræfter, når det er gennemført.

entries.en: Email support@trustcare.app with your app version and issue details.
entries.da: Send en e-mail til support@trustcare.app med din appversion og oplysninger om problemet.

entries.en: How do I add a review?
How do I delete my account or data?
entries.da: Hvordan sletter jeg min konto eller data?

entries.en: The app needs to restart to apply the new language.
entries.da: Appen skal genstarte for at anvende det nye sprog.

entries.en: The app will restart in %@. Continue?
Translation is provided for convenience; the English version prevails.
entries.da: Oversættelsen stilles til rådighed for nemheds skyld; den engelske version er gældende.

entries.en: Are you sure you want to log out?
entries.da: Er du sikker på, at du vil logge ud?

entries.en: Share your experience by posting your first review.
entries.da: Del din oplevelse ved at skrive din første anmeldelse.

entries.en: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or your personal data, contact us at support@trustcare.app.
entries.da: Hvis du har spørgsmål om denne privatlivspolitik eller dine personoplysninger, kan du kontakte os på support@trustcare.app.

entries.en: If you are in the EEA/UK, you may also contact your local data protection authority.
entries.da: Hvis du befinder dig i EØS/Storbritannien, kan du også kontakte din lokale databeskyttelsesmyndighed.

entries.en: Our web surfaces may use cookies and local storage to keep sessions secure and improve performance.
entries.da: Vores weboverflader kan bruge cookies og lokal lagring for at holde sessioner sikre og forbedre ydeevnen.

entries.en: You can control cookie preferences in your browser settings, though disabling them may affect functionality.
entries.da: Du kan styre cookie-præferencer i dine browserindstillinger, selvom deaktivering af dem kan påvirke funktionaliteten.

entries.en: Analytics cookies are used in aggregate form to understand usage trends and improve the service.
entries.da: Analyse-cookies bruges i aggregeret form for at forstå brugstendenser og forbedre tjenesten.

entries.en: We collect account data such as email, name, profile preferences, and authentication metadata.
entries.da: Vi indsamler kontodata såsom e-mail, navn, profilpræferencer og godkendelsesmetadata.

entries.en: When you submit reviews, we collect ratings, comments, optional media, and optional verification artifacts.
entries.da: Når du indsender anmeldelser, indsamler vi bedømmelser, kommentarer, valgfrie medier og valgfrie verifikationsbeviser.

entries.en: We may process device and usage data including app events, approximate location, and diagnostics.
entries.da: Vi kan behandle enheds- og brugsdata, herunder app-hændelser, omtrentlig lokation og diagnostik.

entries.en: We do not intentionally collect sensitive health records beyond the information you choose to submit.
entries.da: Vi indsamler ikke bevidst følsomme sundhedsjournaler ud over de oplysninger, du vælger at indsende.

entries.en: We share data with service providers that operate hosting, analytics, moderation, and communication systems.
entries.da: Vi deler data med tjenesteudbydere, der driver hosting-, analyse-, moderations- og kommunikationssystemer.

entries.en: We may disclose information when required by law, regulation, legal process, or to protect users and platform integrity.
entries.da: Vi kan videregive oplysninger, når det kræves af lov, regulering, juridisk proces, eller for at beskytte brugere og platformens integritet.

entries.en: We do not sell personal data to third parties.
entries.da: Vi sælger ikke personoplysninger til tredjeparter.

entries.en: We use personal data to provide core app functionality, personalize content, and maintain account security.
entries.da: Vi bruger personoplysninger til at levere kernefunktionalitet i appen, personalisere indhold og opretholde kontosikkerhed.

entries.en: We use submitted reviews and metadata for trust, safety, moderation, fraud prevention, and quality assurance.
entries.da: Vi bruger indsendte anmeldelser og metadata til tillid, sikkerhed, moderation, bedrageribekæmpelse og kvalitetssikring.

entries.en: We may use aggregated and de-identified analytics to improve product experience and reliability.
entries.da: Vi kan bruge aggregerede og afidentificerede analyser til at forbedre produktoplevelsen og pålideligheden.

entries.en: Depending on your region, you may have rights to access, correct, export, restrict, or delete your personal data.
entries.da: Afhængigt af din region kan du have ret til at få adgang til, rette, eksportere, begrænse eller slette dine personoplysninger.

entries.en: You can update profile information directly in the app or request support for account-level actions.
entries.da: Du kan opdatere profiloplysninger direkte i appen eller anmode om support til handlinger på kontoniveau.

entries.en: You may object to certain processing where applicable under local law.
entries.da: Du kan gøre indsigelse mod visse behandlinger, hvor det er gældende under lokal lovgivning.

entries.en: To exercise your rights, contact support@trustcare.app and we will respond within the legally required timeframe.
entries.da: For at udøve dine rettigheder, kontakt support@trustcare.app, og vi vil svare inden for den lovpligtige tidsramme.

entries.en: We apply technical and organizational safeguards designed to protect data against unauthorized access and misuse.
entries.da: Vi anvender tekniske og organisatoriske sikkerhedsforanstaltninger, der er designet til at beskytte data mod uautoriseret adgang og misbrug.

entries.en: No online system is completely secure; we continuously monitor and improve our controls.
entries.da: Intet online system er fuldstændig sikkert; vi overvåger og forbedrer løbende vores kontroller.

entries.en: If a security incident affects your data, we will notify you and regulators when legally required.
entries.da: Hvis en sikkerhedshændelse påvirker dine data, vil vi underrette dig og tilsynsmyndighederne, når det er lovmæssigt krævet.

entries.en: I understand: These suggestions are for guidance only, not diagnosis
entries.da: Jeg forstår: Disse forslag er kun vejledende, ikke en diagnose

entries.en: Please wait %d seconds to send again.
entries.da: Vent venligst %d sekunder, før du sender igen.

entries.en: Daily free limit reached (5/5). Try again tomorrow.
entries.da: Daglige gratis grænse nået (5/5). Prøv igen i morgen.

entries.en: This will permanently delete this conversation and all its messages.
entries.da: Dette vil permanent slette denne samtale og alle dens beskeder.

entries.en: This is not medical advice. Always consult a healthcare professional.
entries.da: Dette er ikke medicinsk rådgivning. Konsulter altid en sundhedsprofessionel.

entries.en: If you or someone else is in danger, call immediately.
entries.da: Hvis du eller andre er i fare, ring med det samme.

entries.en: 🚨 A potential emergency risk was detected. Please call 112 immediately.
entries.da: 🚨 En potentiel nødsituation blev opdaget. Ring 112 med det samme.

entries.en: Share your symptoms, I'll guide you to the right specialty.
entries.da: Del dine symptomer, jeg vil guide dig til det rette speciale.

entries.en: No diagnosis or treatment is provided; guidance only.
entries.da: Der gives ingen diagnose eller behandling; kun vejledning.

entries.en: Start one to get health guidance.
entries.da: Start en for at få sundhedsvejledning.

entries.en: Recommends the right specialty based on your symptoms
entries.da: Anbefaler det rette speciale baseret på dine symptomer
Finder sundhedsudbydere i nærheden af dig

entries.en: Please sign in to use Rehber.
entries.da: Log venligst ind for at bruge Rehber.

entries.en: Rehber could not respond. Please try again.
entries.da: Rehber kunne ikke svare. Prøv venligst igen.

entries.en: ⚠️ This service is not a medical diagnosis or treatment recommendation. Always consult a healthcare professional.
entries.da: ⚠️ Denne tjeneste er ikke en medicinsk diagnose eller behandlingsanbefaling. Konsulter altid en sundhedsprofessionel.

entries.en: This feature will become a subscription. It's currently available to everyone for testing.
entries.da: Denne funktion bliver et abonnement. Den er i øjeblikket tilgængelig for alle til test.

entries.en: TrustCare Plus feature - Free trial: 5 questions per day
entries.da: TrustCare Plus funktion - Gratis prøveperiode: 5 spørgsmål pr. dag

entries.en: Response could not be generated. Please try again.
entries.da: Svar kunne ikke genereres. Prøv venligst igen.

entries.en: Start one to get health guidance.
entries.da: Start en for at få sundhedsvejledning.

entries.en: Please provide any additional context that might help us review this report.
entries.da: Giv venligst enhver yderligere kontekst, der kan hjælpe os med at gennemgå denne anmeldelse.

entries.en: Why are you reporting this review?
Thank you. We'll review this report.
entries.da: Tak. Vi vil gennemgå denne anmeldelse.
Kan du ikke finde den? Tilføj ny

entries.en: Did the doctor listen and explain clearly?
Was the clinic clean and hygienic?
Did the treatment resolve your issue?
How long did you wait after your appointment time?
entries.da: Hvor længe ventede du efter din aftalte tid?

entries.en: Photos will be visible to everyone.
entries.da: Billeder vil være synlige for alle.

entries.en: This will not be shown publicly.
entries.da: Dette vil ikke blive vist offentligt.
Vælg en udbyder for at fortsætte

entries.en: Your review has been submitted and will appear once processed.
entries.da: Din anmeldelse er indsendt og vil vises, når den er behandlet.

entries.en: Help us maintain trust by verifying your visit.
entries.da: Hjælp os med at opretholde tilliden ved at verificere dit besøg.

entries.en: Save providers to access them quickly later.
entries.da: Gem udbydere for hurtigt at få adgang til dem senere.

entries.en: Were aftercare instructions and follow-up clearly explained?
entries.da: Blev efterbehandlingsinstruktioner og opfølgning klart forklaret?

entries.en: Did the doctor listen and explain clearly?
How would you rate the medical care?
entries.da: Hvordan vil du bedømme den medicinske pleje?

entries.en: Was the clinic clean and hygienic?
Were procedure risks and outcomes explained?
entries.da: Blev procedurens risici og resultater forklaret?

entries.en: Were treatment rooms and equipment clean?
How quickly were you called for your test?
entries.da: Hvor hurtigt blev du kaldt ind til din test?

entries.en: Was the office peaceful and private?
Was the facility clean and hygienic?
How quickly were you seen by a doctor?
entries.da: Hvor hurtigt blev du tilset af en læge?

entries.en: How well did they manage pain?
Did the pharmacist answer your questions well?
Did staff make the procedure comfortable?
Did your session start on time?
Did sessions improve mobility or reduce pain?
entries.da: Forbedrede sessionerne mobiliteten eller reducerede smerten?

entries.en: How quickly did your session start?
Are you satisfied with the results?
Did the therapist monitor and adapt?
Did the treatment resolve your issue?
How long did you wait after your appointment time?
entries.da: Hvor længe ventede du efter din aftalte tid?

entries.en: Switch to list view for more results.
entries.da: Skift til listevisning for at se flere resultater.

entries.en: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and activity under your account.
entries.da: Du er ansvarlig for at opretholde fortroligheden af dine loginoplysninger og aktivitet på din konto.

entries.en: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, applicable law, or platform safety requirements.
entries.da: Vi kan suspendere eller afslutte konti, der overtræder disse vilkår, gældende lov eller platformens sikkerhedskrav.

entries.en: Questions about these Terms can be sent to support@trustcare.app.
entries.da: Spørgsmål om disse vilkår kan sendes til support@trustcare.app.

entries.en: By continuing to use the service, you acknowledge that you have read and agreed to these Terms.
entries.da: Ved at fortsætte med at bruge tjenesten, bekræfter du, at du har læst og accepteret disse vilkår.

entries.en: These Terms are governed by applicable laws of the jurisdiction where the service operator is established, unless local mandatory law provides otherwise.
entries.da: Disse vilkår er underlagt gældende love i den jurisdiktion, hvor tjenesteudbyderen er etableret, medmindre lokal ufravigelig lovgivning bestemmer andet.

entries.en: Before initiating formal proceedings, you agree to contact us in good faith to seek an informal resolution.
entries.da: Før du indleder formelle retssager, accepterer du at kontakte os i god tro for at søge en uformel løsning.

entries.en: All platform content, branding, and software are owned by TrustCare or licensed to us, unless otherwise stated.
entries.da: Alt platformindhold, branding og software ejes af TrustCare eller er licenseret til os, medmindre andet er angivet.

entries.en: You may not copy, scrape, reverse engineer, or redistribute platform content beyond permitted legal use.
entries.da: Du må ikke kopiere, indsamle (scrape), reverse engineere eller videredistribuere platformindhold ud over tilladt lovlig brug.

entries.en: Rehber provides informational guidance only and does not provide medical diagnosis, treatment, or emergency response.
entries.da: Rehber giver kun informativ vejledning og leverer ikke medicinsk diagnose, behandling eller nødrespons.

entries.en: In urgent or life-threatening situations, contact local emergency services immediately.
entries.da: I akutte eller livstruende situationer skal du straks kontakte den lokale alarmcentral.

entries.en: You remain responsible for healthcare decisions and should consult qualified medical professionals.
entries.da: Du er fortsat ansvarlig for sundhedsbeslutninger og bør konsultere kvalificerede læger.

entries.en: Reviews must reflect genuine, firsthand experiences and must not include harassment, hate speech, or unlawful content.
entries.da: Anmeldelser skal afspejle ægte, førstehåndsoplevelser og må ikke indeholde chikane, hadefuld tale eller ulovligt indhold.

entries.en: By submitting content, you grant TrustCare a license to host, display, and moderate that content for service operation.
entries.da: Ved at indsende indhold giver du TrustCare licens til at hoste, vise og moderere det indhold med henblik på driften af tjenesten.

entries.en: We may remove, limit, or flag content that violates policy, legal obligations, or trust and safety standards.
entries.da: Vi kan fjerne, begrænse eller markere indhold, der overtræder politikker, juridiske forpligtelser eller standarder for tillid og sikkerhed.

entries.en: TrustCare provides healthcare discovery, review features, and informational guidance tools for general consumer use.
entries.da: TrustCare leverer opdagelse af sundhedspleje, anmeldelsesfunktioner og informative vejledningsværktøjer til almindelig forbrugerbrug.

entries.en: Service availability, features, and access may change over time; we may update or discontinue parts of the service without prior notice.
entries.da: Tjenestens tilgængelighed, funktioner og adgang kan ændre sig over tid; vi kan opdatere eller afbryde dele af tjenesten uden forudgående varsel.

entries.en: You agree to provide accurate information and use the platform lawfully, respectfully, and in good faith.
entries.da: Du accepterer at give korrekte oplysninger og bruge platformen lovligt, respektfuldt og i god tro.

entries.en: You must not attempt to abuse the platform, bypass security controls, or interfere with other users.
entries.da: Du må ikke forsøge at misbruge platformen, omgå sikkerhedskontroller eller forstyrre andre brugere.

entries.en: You are responsible for content you submit and for complying with applicable local laws and regulations.
entries.da: Du er ansvarlig for indhold, du indsender, og for at overholde gældende lokale love og regler.

entries.en: Try English keywords or check spelling.
entries.da: Prøv engelske søgeord eller tjek stavningen.

entries.en: Widen the map area and search again.
